context: A grandmother celebrates her birthday with family and friends as she leans forward to blow out the candles.

actions.description: The grandmother smiles behind the pink birthday cake as candle flames flicker warmly.
She leans forward and blows gently, causing the many candle flames to flicker and fade.
The candles go dark, thin smoke rises, and the blurred family celebrates around the table.

segments.description: Set the warm dining room, joyful grandmother, pink cake, and glowing candles.
segments.key_changes: candle flames flicker; grandmother smiles; background family leans in

segments.description: Focus on the gentle puff as the grandmother blows out the candles.
segments.key_changes: grandmother leans forward; flames bend and vanish; cake remains foreground anchor
segments.camera: stable shallow-focus shot with slight push-in

segments.description: Hold on the happy aftermath with smoke rising and family celebrating softly out of focus.
segments.key_changes: smoke curls upward; family claps; grandmother smiles wider

temporal_caption: A joyful grandmother in a light blue floral blouse blows out the candles on a pink birthday cake while family celebrates nearby.
audio_description: Gentle birthday room ambience, soft family cheers, small claps, candle puff, faint chair movement, and warm indoor room tone.
